name: Christian Legal Society Chapter v. Martinez
question: Did the Ninth Circuit err when its holding runs directly contrary to the Seventh Circuit's 2006 decision in Christian Legal Society v. Walker?
description: A case in which the Court held that a college's mandate requiring all officially-recognized student organizations be inclusive and welcoming to all students did not violate a group of Christian students' First Amendment rights when the college refused to recognize a student group that required all members to sign a statement of Christian beliefs for membership.
